title: Worxi
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Worxi''' was the ancient native language of the [[Spiner]] species from [[Worxer]].

As Worxer was destroyed centuries before the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Spiners decided to replace their language with [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], which became its adopted native tongue. As of [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Worxi was a dead language.

{{Language-stub}}
